mapper.insert: INSERT INTO testcase_generation_task ( project_id, version_name, module_name, requirement_text, status, total_cases, model_name, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{versionName}, #{moduleName}, #{requirementText}, #{status}, #{totalCases}, #{modelName}, #{errorMessage}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, version_name, module_name, requirement_text, status, total_cases, model_name, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM testcase_generation_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE testcase_generation_task SET status = #{status}, total_cases = #{totalCases}, model_name = #{modelName}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
